response.justification: Wei Chen brings well over the required 6 years of fullstack experience, with strong TypeScript/Node.js product work, React and MongoDB exposure, AWS and Kubernetes familiarity, and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) that directly matches a rare requirement. A demonstrated testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, test-tooling authorship) fits the quality expectations. Gaps are stack-specific rather than fundamental: no evidence of Nest.js or Kotlin, and frontend work skews toward Ember.js over React.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js experience with cloud (AWS CDK) and Kubernetes exposure
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling work, matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, built test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience listed, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated and limited
Significant investment in niche DLang ecosystem; React depth less evident than Ember.js

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary/secondary stack
